headline: Equifax Governance Questions Grow As Special Meeting Push Meets Valuation Gap
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) investors are weighing a shareholder proposal to allow holders to call special shareholder meetings. The proposal highlights ongoing governance tensions at the company as shareholders seek a stronger voice between annual meetings. At the same time, Equifax’s latest Market Pulse Index data points to widening divides in U.S. consumer financial health across generations and income tiers. Equifax, best known for its credit reporting and consumer data services, sits at the...

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Enerflex (TSX:EFX) After Its 216.5% One Year Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Enerflex's recent share price puts it in the bargain bin or the overhyped bucket? This article walks through the key numbers that matter for value focused investors. Enerflex's share price sits at $28.44 after a 2.3% decline over the last week and a 3.4% decline over the past month, although the stock has returned 30.2% year to date and 216.5% over the last year. That kind of move often follows shifts in how the market views a company's risk and long term prospects, whether...
